description: Queen Patch 2 (5 February 2020) — Portal Binding, Wardrobe, Dungeon, Crystal League, Royal Armors, Hellgates, Combat Balance Changes, Fixes.

sections.heading: Portal Binding Changes
items: The portal binding reset cooldown period has been reduced from 30 days to 7 days
sections.searchable_text: Portal Binding Changes reset cooldown 30 days 7 days

sections.heading: Wardrobe Skin Changes
sections.description: Wardrobe skin settings for instanced PvP and PvE areas now no longer overwrite the player's custom settings. Players who choose "always show" will see Wardrobe Skins in the following areas:
items: Hellgates
Crystal League Matches
City Fights
Arena
Expeditions
sections.searchable_text: Wardrobe Skin Changes instanced PvP PvE custom settings always show Hellgates Crystal League Matches City Fights Arena Expeditions

sections.heading: Yellow Zone Dungeon Fixes
sections.description: Dungeons in the following yellow zones now follow yellow-zone rules as intended (previously classified as red-zone):
items: Lewsdon Hill
Snapshaft Trough
Sleetwater Basin
sections.searchable_text: Yellow Zone Dungeon Fixes Lewsdon Hill Snapshaft Trough Sleetwater Basin red-zone yellow-zone rules

sections.heading: Additional Crystal League Timeslots Added
sections.description: Level 1-3 Crystal League matches now occur 6 times per day (previously 3) at the following times:
items: 2:00 UTC
2:30 UTC (new)
13:30 UTC (new)
20:30 UTC (new)
sections.searchable_text: Crystal League Timeslots Level 1 2 3 matches 6 times per day 2:00 UTC 2:30 UTC 13:00 UTC 13:30 UTC 20:00 UTC 20:30 UTC

sections.heading: Changes to Royal Armors and Faction Capes
items: Reduced crafting times and adjusted item power for Royal Armors and Faction Capes to bring them in line with other armors
Doubled the rune, soul, and relic cost of enchanting for Royal Armors (intended to go live with the Queen update but not implemented)
sections.searchable_text: Royal Armors Faction Capes crafting times item power rune soul relic enchanting cost doubled Queen update

sections.heading: Improvements
sections.description: Increased the availability of Hellgates in the Outlands. Added additional ingame notifications related to Hideouts.
items: Hideout is low on food
Hideout player is currently in is under attack
sections.searchable_text: Improvements Hellgates Outlands Greater 5v5 Gatekeeper Respawn 15min 10min Max Spawns 80 100 Lesser 2v2 Respawn 8min 6min Hideout notifications food under attack

sections.heading: Changes
items: Realmgate areas that previously displayed as "Conquerors' Hall Lv.1" are now called "[City] Realmgate" for clarity - this also improves clarity of related popups, such as portal lock warnings
Reduced the rate of vanity capes in the loot table of Randomized Dungeon chests
Avalonian Archer's cooldown for knocking back close players increased to 2 seconds (was 1 second)
The following Crystal Realm statistics were moved to a new "Archive" section below other stats: Crystal Realm Battles, Crystal Realm Kills, Crystal Realm Kill Fame, Crystal Realm Fame as an Ally

Changes to Thorns (Nature Staff): Behavior is now the same as other damage reflections in the game; Certain spells can no longer be reflected; This change is intended to solve unintended chaining of reflect events
sections.searchable_text: Changes Realmgate Conquerors Hall City clarity portal lock vanity capes loot Randomized Dungeon Avalonian Archer cooldown 2 seconds 1 second Crystal Realm statistics Archive Battles Kills Kill Fame Ally Thorns Nature Staff damage reflections reflect events chaining

changes.raw_text: Hunting Instinct (Snow Husky): Cast Time: 0s → 0.8s Standtime: 0.8s → 0s Hit Delay: 0.8s → 0s

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Fixed an issue where spell hit indications were not shown correctly for some instant-cast spells (e.g. Frost Bomb)
"Hostile" actions with friendly players no longer count as combat actions - fixes a bug where getting killed shortly after a "friendly" smoke bomb resulted in a 3-minute knockdown countdown
Fixed an issue where the spell "Opening to Hell" (Demon Cape) did not affect mounted players
Fixed an issue where the second hit of "Devastating Strike" (Black Hands) didn't trigger if the stun was cleansed
Fixed a bug that prevented "Defensive Slam" (Maces) from affecting mounted players
Fixed an issue where "Scent of the Wilderness" (Skinner Workboots) remained active when mounted
Fixed an issue where Level 2 and 3 Hideouts did not show damaged state until two or more shields were lost
Fixed an issue that resulted in lower tier common fish in some T7 ocean fishing areas
Crafting Avalonian items now fills the related laborer journal as intended
Avalonian Energy is no longer returned by crafting focus, as intended
Lowered Avalonian Energy requirement of non-enchanted T7 Avalonian Omelettes by 25 to their intended value
Gathering enchanted stone now fills Stone Trophy journals as intended
Large rhinos in Hide Dens were replaced with Desert Wolves as intended
Numerous additional animation, terrain, graphical, audio, and localization fixes
